transcript.text:
(Gam)
("Gam" means "to feel" : I can feel it) This is awesome! It's so good
(Tan)
("Tan" means charcoal : Cooked with real oak wood charcoal...)
(Gye)
(Feel the chicken cooked with charcoal)
("GamTanGye" Charcoal-grilled chicken)
(Are you ready to be amazed?)
(Amazed at the chicken and her)
(Bravo...)
(Beomgye Station in Anyang-si, Gyeonggi)
Hello, everyone
Today, I am here
to eat charcoal-grilled chicken
(Supernova when it comes to charcoal-grilled chicken) This place is called "GamTanGye"
It's famous these days for their charcoal-grilled chicken

GamTanGye...?
Does it mean I'll be amazed?
I'll try going in now
Hello
(Welcome to "GamTanGye"!)
(Delivery mission) Thank you
- Nice(?)!! - LOLOL
(GamTanGye employees are filling the restaurant)
What is the meaning of "GamTanGye"?
"Gam means to feel" "Tan means charcoal" and "Gye means chicken"
We use real oak wood charcoal to grill!
(Feel the charcoal-grilled chicken) Gam - to feel, Tan - charcoal, Gye - chicken
There's regular seasoned one, salted one,
and cheese chicken, these are the three choices
There's a 1 and a half portion chicken too
(Charcoal-grilled chicken you can adjust the amount you want) That would be perfect

Wow, they have a lot of topping options
There are quail eggs
(Toppings that you can freely add) Green onions, ramyun... Sounds good
(She takes longer time thinking about what to eat...)
(The owner of this branch) Hello
If you can't pick,
we will prepare
a special dish for you
(Problem solved) Alright
- Thank you - Please wait a sec
(GamTanGye's charcoal chicken grilled with oak wood charcoal)
(Grilled to perfection with a smokey scent that fills your mouth...)
(Making the smokey flavor come to life again...)
(Grilled and seasoned chicken with cheese)
(What kind of skewer is this...?)
(A newcomer to skewers, smokey sausage and green onion)

(Half & Half grilled chicken)
(Salted and grilled chicken)
(The chicken is here) Thank you
Thank you!
(What is this...?)
(Very awkward) Ta-da
We have prepared this specially for you!
What is this?
(Half & Half grilled chicken) This is our signature grilled and seasoned chicken
and this is sausage and green onion skewer
(Crunchy green onion with a kick that replaces rice cakes)
What is this?
These are chips
(Nacho chips that are great for sides)
But...
(Huge...) What is this...?

This is also our grilled and seasoned chicken!
It usually comes out all cut up but today,
(Whole grilled and seasoned chicken made special!) we wanted you to feel how juicy it is...
(It tastes the same as the original grilled and seasoned chicken) It's the same thing, right?
(Done with explanations) Hope you enjoy
Thank you
I'll eat the cheese one first
The cheese is here
(The cheese is amazing...!) Wow, awesome
Oh, I want to try the seasoned one first
Oh, should I try this one first?
The smokey flavor is no joke...!
I can smell the smokiness as soon as I put it in my mouth
It's very juicy and tender
and the seasoning is really good
Wow, they grilled it really well

(Leaning Tower of Skewers...) This keeps falling
Get up!
(Hole) There's a hole here
I love that the seasoning seeped in well
Ta-da!
(This was what the hole was for...)
Wow, it's good
Wow, you know what
I should've eaten the salted one first
Wow!
The salted ones are good too!
The salted one is like
very crispy on the outside, juicy on the inside
The outer skin
is crunchy like crackers (thanks to the charcoal)
That juice

and the chicken itself is really tender
It's so good
Seriously, this...
Oh, hello
(Next-door owner came to see Tzuyang)
(Giving her plum drinks) Thank you!
I'll really enjoy these, thank you
(GamTanGye won't lose either) Wow! Thank you
The cup looks
very unique
Wow, the salted chicken
(Very satisfied) is more delicious than I imagined
Personally,
for charcoal-grilled chicken like this,
there's a dry texture,
so I don't eat it that often

(GamTanGye is different...!) But this one is crispy on the outside, juicy on the inside
There's green onion too, which goes really well together
Wow, the green onion is really sweet
(The green onion is soft and delicious thanks to the seasoning) It's soft and sweet, should I say?
These chips are for
wrapping it around the chicken
It's unique
Charcoal-grilled chicken...
doesn't have that fried layer
(These chips really substitute well) These chips make up for that lack of crispiness
Wow, it's really good
It tastes very savory
When you want crispy chicken
Maybe I should try this first
It's green onion and sausage
Normally, they have rice cakes with sausage

But this one,
it has green onions and sausage
But I can tell that they go well together
Wow, this is...
a delicious sausage
(Specializing in charcoal chicken, the green onion is smokey as well) Since they're a charcoal grilling place, the green onions are so good
If you like grilled green onions, this would be perfect
I think it goes well with this
It goes well with the seasoned chicken
(Another bite...!)
Wow, but today...
(The smokey flavor is calling for drinks...) It would go so well with beer
(Gonna look at the drinks now)
There's Highball!
It would go so perfectly!
(Original, Earl Gray, Blue Lemon, three types of Highball) Earl Gray Highball and Blue Lemon sound good

I think it'll go well with chicken,
(Making excuses) so just one...
(I have no choice but to drink it...) Earl Gray Highball
I want to try eating one of this
How do I take it out?
But...
Can I pull it out?
(Swoop)
Wow, this is so big
I guess they come in big pieces like this
One lump
(Earl Gray Highball) You should mix this, right?
(※ You should mix well before drinking Highball)
(The bear is taking a bath...) Is this ice? Wow, that's cool!
The ice details...
(Crazy detail) There's fur detail too

But how do I mix this?
Stir...?
(Instagram vibe is always on her mind when she eats)
(Mix mix)
The bear...
(Getting motion sickness, stop it)
Oh, it's good!
Sweet Earl Gray flavor
It's really good
(Whole grilled chicken just for Tzuyang) They made it big just for me
Wow, this should be on the menu officially
This is really good
It's really juicy too
I think it's more delicious eaten this way
Wow, thank you
I need to mix this one too

Wow, this...
(Blue Lemon Highball with vibrant colors like the sea) Can you see the blue at the bottom?
The color is so pretty
(Call an ambulance for 2 bears please)
There are noodles too
(Noodles are a must for delicious sauce!) Wow, the noodles look so good
(Can taste chicken in the noodles?) It tastes like chicken
It's good, it goes really well together
It looks so good
Wow, the noodles have that slight kick
There's a smokey flavor and spicy flavor
It's my first time tasting this kind of thing
It's really good
Just like how people eat rice with chicken, noodles are good too
(Of course, you too)
This with the salted chicken would be good too

(She says three "Mmm" when it's really good)
Green onion!
A huge whole drumstick like this
I feel like I'm ripping a whole leg
Seasoned....
The chicken itself isn't that spicy
(The sauce seeped into the noodles) But the noodles are really spicy
To here
The combination of all the food here is so good
The green...
Onion and sausage
(Her brain isn't working...) Sausage and green onion
And stir-fried noodles!
And...
(Two types of chicken flavors!) Salted and seasoned chicken
(Satisfied) The amount is so satisfactory

This is...
called "Tzuyang Set"
(Seriously? Tzuyang Set will be sold for a limited time) It will be sold as a set for a short period of time
(Awkward)
You can taste various types of things,
so if you're curious, I think it's worth a try
It's really good
(Right up her alley) It's the perfect amount of saltiness that I wanted
The juiciness and saltiness that I wanted
(Is this the charcoal-grilled combo?) Should I skewer it like this?
(You can't help but think about chicken skewers) Wow, I think they can make green onion and chicken skewers
Skewer it on in a vertical way
(Falls)
(Plate skewer is not possible)
Just like... Wow
It's a perfect chicken skewer!

Should I wrap this in this?
(This looks like...) And this on top of that!
It's like a hamburger!
(Perfect combo) It goes well together!
(A golden balance that cannot be judged...) I can't judge which one is better
Normally, when I have to choose between fried and seasoned chicken,
I will choose fried
(A close game) But the seasoned one and the salted one is so good, I can't choose
Wow, can you see the shine on the chicken?
(So juicy,...!) The oil is dripping down
The cheese has hardened
so I'll ask them to heat it up again
You really ate it all...
(They're just so amazed at Tzu...)
It's so cool seeing it with my own eyes
Try it

(Strongly denies) I can't do it
But is this really going to be called my...
Tzuyang Set?!
(When this is uploaded on March 18th, the menu will be released)
What if it's not popular?
- No!! - That will not happen!
(Just a personal opinion) If it's not popular, the headquarters will buy it
How many meals do you eat in a day?
Well, if it's less, then it's 2 meals
If it's a lot...
4~5 meals?!
Then how much do you spend on food a month?!
On average...
6 million won
6 million won? A month?
(Q&A continued after that...)

(Crush)
(Hey, let's use our words) She wants to stop answering questions
(Kidding) She's a bit annoyed LOL
(I was framed) No, no! No, I'm not
Add a bunch of green onions
(Cheese came back)
Insane
(Warm cheese is the best) The cheese is so stretchy
As expected
(Speechless)
The sauce here
is really great for eating chicken with rice
(Chicken with rice is a must) If you like rice, you would love this
(I'm craving it too...)
But as expected...
The sauce goes so well with cheese

(This is a must-eat with chips!)
When I see rice cakes with holes,
(We all think the same way) I always used chopsticks...
I'll use this to pick up the chicken
Put this on top
(Decline)
What's with me today?
(Do you not use utensils on a regular basis...?) I think I used chopsticks too much
I thought you couldn't finish it all...
(Can't believe it even after seeing it...) I thought she'd quit midway
(Done)
Did you enjoy the food?
Wow, I really enjoyed it
(Infinite thank yous) Thank you so much for enjoying it a lot
I had a nice meal as well!
(Had a taste of Tzuyang Set that is to be released) This is the Tzuyang Set that we prepared today

We'll add it on the menu
and try to sell lots!!
(Goodness LOL)
If Tzuyang comes, shouldn't the set be free?
(Rejected at the entrance...) No, you need to pay to eat it
(I'll buy it myself later on) Thank you so much for today
Thank you
Wow, I really enjoyed it today
And
(GamTanGye chicken you can enjoy at your own home!) for those living in Seoul and Gyeonggi-do, it can be delivered
(Please enjoy the smokey flavor at the comfort of your home!) If you are interested, I think you should try this
I had
a great meal once again
